name: 42 ST GILES
subtitle: Dentists, Oxford
tagline: Private dentistry in a beautiful Grade II listed building on St Giles’, Oxford — check-ups, hygiene, implants and cosmetic care.

services.name: Residential Conveyancing
services.desc: Buying or selling property? We handle the entire process from offer to completion with transparent fixed fees.

services.name: Family Law
services.desc: Divorce, financial settlements, child arrangements. Sensitive, practical advice when you need it most.

services.name: Wills & Probate
services.desc: Protect your legacy with a professionally drafted will. Estate administration handled with care.

services.name: Employment Law
services.desc: Settlement agreements, unfair dismissal, redundancy. Clear advice for employees and employers.

services.name: Commercial Property
services.desc: Leases, acquisitions, and development. Strategic advice for business owners and investors.

services.name: Dispute Resolution
services.desc: Contract disputes, debt recovery, professional negligence. Resolution before litigation.
